summary: Split the store into archive (sync-cache) and library (D2C content) DBs with independent version domains; added OpenLibrary, migrateLibrary, and library tables/indexes/FTS5.
reason: The novel content-production layer needs its own persistent tables versioned independently of the generated sync-cache schema.
validated_outcome: Schema migration test creates archive.db and library.db with independent user_version domains; FTS5 prompt search returns expected results.
